cards.title: Input and Growth
cards.governance_note: Define input size, dominant growth, case assumptions, and tightness of the bound.

cards.title: Thresholds and Benchmarks
cards.governance_note: Pair Big-O claims with representative benchmarks and scale thresholds.

cards.title: Hidden Cost Communication
cards.governance_note: Document constants, memory, I/O, preprocessing, human review, and plain-language limits.
